hero.lede: Manuel Dugué · freelance technologist based in Dresden. Product, engineering, strategy; most often at the seam between them.

proof.label: Social proof
proof.heading: What model-generated clients say
proof.sub: Entirely synthetic, generated on demand. Plausibility may vary.
proof.banner: All testimonials above were produced by a language model. They have not been approved by any client, because no client was consulted. Their resemblance to real praise is a feature, not a claim.

status.t: Finishing two long-running engagements and slowly opening the calendar for Q3. Mostly reading Knuth in the evenings.

elsewhere.t: Writing less than I should. Running more than I expected. Living in Dresden, working with the EU and a few US-West teams.
